zh.Clermont-Ferrand,63113,Puy-de-Dôme,Auver: 法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德
zh.Saint Pierre de Cornillon, Grenoble, Duc: 沙吉皮 艾特 米可隆沙吉皮
zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume VI d'AUVERGNE於大約1069年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德時，他的父親Robert IV d'AUVERGNE35歲，母親Judith de Melgueil21歲。他於1087年11月28日與Emme de SICILE結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1136年2月8日在他的家鄉享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume VI d'AUVERGNE于大约1069年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德时，他的父亲Robert IV d'AUVERGNE35岁，母亲Judith de Melgueil21岁。他于1087年11月28日与Emme de SICILE结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1136年2月8日在他的家乡享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume VI d'AUVERGNE was born about 1069, in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, Robert IV d'AUVERGNE, was 35 and his mother, Judith de Melgueil, was 21. He married Emme de SICILE on 28 November 1087. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 8 February 1136, in his hometown, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume VI d'AUVERGNE est né environ 1069, à Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Robert IV d'AUVERGNE, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Judith de Melgueil, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Emme de SICILE le 28 novembre 1087. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 8 février 1136, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume VI d'AUVERGNE um 1069 in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert IV d'AUVERGNE 35 und seine Mutter Judith de Melgueil 21. Er hat am 28. November 1087 Emme de SICILE geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 8. Februar 1136 im Alter von 68 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume VI d'AUVERGNE è nato il circa 1069 nel Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, il suo padre, Robert IV d'AUVERGNE, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Judith de Melgueil, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Emme de SICILE il 28 novembre 1087. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 8 febbraio 1136, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-: フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメクラーモント-フエランド
ja.Clermont-Ferrand,63113,Puy-de-Dôme,Auver: フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメクラーモント-フエランド
ja.Saint Pierre de Cornillon, Grenoble, Duc: サイント-パエア エト ミクエロンサイント-パエア
ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume VI d'AUVERGNEが約1069年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメクラーモント-フエランドで生まれた時，父Robert IV d'AUVERGNEは35歳，母Judith de Melgueilは21歳であった。1087年11月28日にEmme de SICILEと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1136年2月8日に故郷で68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume VI d'AUVERGNE(이)가 대략 1069년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 푸이-데-드o 클레몽-페랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert IV d'AUVERGNE(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Judith de Melgueil(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1087년 11월 28일 Emme de SICILE(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1136년 2월 8일 그의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume VI d'AUVERGNE nasceu aproximadamente 1069, em Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Robert IV d'AUVERGNE, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Judith de Melgueil, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Emme de SICILE em 28 de novembro de 1087. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 8 de fevereiro de 1136, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume VI d'AUVERGNE родился около 1069 г. в местности клирмонт-фирранд, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert IV d'AUVERGNE было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Judith de Melgueil, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Emme de SICILE 28 ноября 1087 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 8 февраля 1136 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume VI d'AUVERGNE nació aproximadamente 1069, en Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Robert IV d'AUVERGNE, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Judith de Melgueil, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Emme de SICILE el 28 de noviembre de 1087. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 8 de febrero de 1136, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años.
